title: OCSMP Title Screen
description: Title screen resource pack for OCSMP.
body:
This resource pack adds new panorama backgrounds featuring many locations from [OCSMP](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ocsmp).

New panoramas include:
- Aquidor
- Blobbin' Keep
- Dark Den
- Extoria
- Farlands
- Gilbert Lake
- Gloob
- Helios Island
- Lightwood
- New Mandalore
- Old Crossroads
- Season 1 Spawn
- Season 2 Spawn
- Season 3 Spawn
- Shadow Collective
- Spiritwood
- Summit City
- Sunnyside
- Tartarus X
- Town of Elis
- Yummers Volcano

The pack also changes the title text.

Requires [Vistas](https://modrinth.com/mod/vistas). Using the pack without the mod will only use the New Mandalore panorama.
